title: TransitionRequest
description: Payload of POST /versions/{id}/transitions. Specifies the target state and an optional reviewer comment (mandatory on rejects).

comment.description: Required when transitioning into a *_REJECTED-style state.

expected_status.description: Optional optimistic-locking guard; the server rejects if the current status does not match.

assignee.description: BR-21 (handoff E17): addressed approver routing. Required when to=IN_REVIEW (submit). Author picks the domain (= the CodeSet's domain) and the specific steward + business-owner accounts (from ownership.domain_role_directory) who will review/approve this version.

domain_id.description: Domain of the CodeSet. The server validates it matches the version's CodeSet domain.

steward_om_user_id.description: om_user_id of the chosen STEWARD (handles IN_REVIEW -> STEWARD_APPROVED).

owner_om_user_id.description: om_user_id of the chosen BUSINESS_OWNER (handles STEWARD_APPROVED -> OWNER_APPROVED).
